description_long: This object is a blocky, modern cash register with a dark, almost black exterior that appears to be constructed from modular panels. The front features a raised display screen labeled 'COMPUTER' and a wide, flat keyboard area with large, white keys, including a prominent 'PAYMENT' button. The structure is robust and angular, with thick side panels and a recessed area beneath the keyboard, suggesting a sturdy build. The back is solid and unadorned, while the sides reveal the depth of the keyboard and the upright display. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding except for the text on the screen and keys. The cash register is likely made from a combination of plastic and metal, with a matte finish and a hard, smooth surface.
description: A blocky, modern cash register with a dark exterior, large white keys, and a raised display screen labeled 'COMPUTER'. The design is robust, angular, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen labeled 'COMPUTER', large white keys, and the main keyboard area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard and the upright display, with thick side panels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned back with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side panel and the profile of the display and keyboard.
attribute_keypad_layout: 3 large rectangular keys in a single row, labeled with text
